
````{r}
# =======================
# LIBRARIES
# =======================
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(emmeans)
library(purrr)

# =======================
# INPUT / OUTPUT
# =======================
file <- "input_files/cell_lines_absorbance.csv"
out_dir <- "output/growth_assays/cell_lines_absorbance"
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# =======================
# READ DATA
# Expected columns:
#   Draxin (or Drain)
#   Absorbance
#   Experiment
#   Cell_line
# =======================
df <- read_csv(file, show_col_types = FALSE)

# If the file uses "Drain" instead of "Draxin", rename it
if ("Drain" %in% names(df) && !"Draxin" %in% names(df)) {
  df <- df %>% rename(Draxin = Drain)
}

df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    Draxin     = factor(as.character(Draxin), levels = c("0", "68")),
    Experiment = factor(Experiment),
    Cell_line  = factor(Cell_line),
    Absorbance = as.numeric(Absorbance)
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(Draxin),
    !is.na(Absorbance),
    !is.na(Cell_line)
  )

# Optional quick check
print("Column names:")
print(names(df))

print("Levels of Cell_line:")
print(levels(df$Cell_line))

print("Counts per Cell_line and Draxin:")
print(df %>% count(Cell_line, Draxin))
```

```{r}
# =======================
# NORMALIZATION
# Normalize each value to the mean of Draxin = 0
# within the same Cell_line and Experiment
# =======================
df_norm <- df %>%
  group_by(Cell_line, Experiment) %>%
  mutate(
    ctrl_mean = mean(Absorbance[Draxin == "0"], na.rm = TRUE),
    Absorbance_norm = Absorbance / ctrl_mean
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

write_csv(df_norm, file.path(out_dir, "cell_lines_absorbance_with_normalization.csv"))

# =======================
# FUNCTION FOR STATS
# Per Cell_line: compare 68 vs 0
# Uses lm if only 1 experiment
# Uses lmer if >1 experiments
# =======================
analyze_one_cell_line <- function(dat, response_var) {
  
  n_exp <- n_distinct(dat$Experiment)
  
  formula_txt <- paste0(response_var, " ~ Draxin")
  
  if (n_exp > 1) {
    model_formula <- as.formula(paste0(formula_txt, " + (1 | Experiment)"))
    m <- lmer(model_formula, data = dat)
  } else {
    model_formula <- as.formula(formula_txt)
    m <- lm(model_formula, data = dat)
  }
  
  emm <- emmeans(m, ~ Draxin)
  contr <- pairs(emm) %>%
    as.data.frame()
  
  means_tbl <- emm %>%
    as.data.frame()
  
  list(
    model = m,
    emmeans = means_tbl,
    contrast = contr
  )
}

# =======================
# RUN STATS PER CELL_LINE
# RAW ABSORBANCE
# =======================
raw_results <- df_norm %>%
  group_split(Cell_line) %>%
  setNames(levels(df_norm$Cell_line)) %>%
  map(~ analyze_one_cell_line(.x, "Absorbance"))

raw_emmeans <- map2_dfr(
  raw_results,
  names(raw_results),
  ~ .x$emmeans %>% mutate(Cell_line = .y, Data = "raw")
)

raw_contrasts <- map2_dfr(
  raw_results,
  names(raw_results),
  ~ .x$contrast %>% mutate(Cell_line = .y, Data = "raw")
)

# =======================
# RUN STATS PER CELL_LINE
# NORMALIZED ABSORBANCE
# =======================
norm_results <- df_norm %>%
  group_split(Cell_line) %>%
  setNames(levels(df_norm$Cell_line)) %>%
  map(~ analyze_one_cell_line(.x, "Absorbance_norm"))

norm_emmeans <- map2_dfr(
  norm_results,
  names(norm_results),
  ~ .x$emmeans %>% mutate(Cell_line = .y, Data = "normalized")
)

norm_contrasts <- map2_dfr(
  norm_results,
  names(norm_results),
  ~ .x$contrast %>% mutate(Cell_line = .y, Data = "normalized")
)

# =======================
# COMBINED MODEL (ADAPTIVE)
# If >1 experiment: lmer
# If 1 experiment: lm
# =======================

n_exp <- n_distinct(df_norm$Experiment)

if (n_exp > 1) {
  m_combined <- lmer(
    Absorbance ~ Draxin * Cell_line + (1 | Experiment),
    data = df_norm
  )
} else {
  m_combined <- lm(
    Absorbance ~ Draxin * Cell_line,
    data = df_norm
  )
}

# EMMs: compare Draxin within each cell line
emm_combined <- emmeans(m_combined, ~ Draxin | Cell_line)

# Since you have only 0 and 68, pairwise is enough
contr_combined <- contrast(
  emm_combined,
  method = "revpairwise",
  adjust = "sidak"
)

emm_combined_df <- as.data.frame(emm_combined)
contr_combined_df <- as.data.frame(contr_combined) %>%
  mutate(
    p_label = case_when(
      p.value < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p.value < 0.01  ~ "**",
      p.value < 0.05  ~ "*",
      TRUE ~ "ns"
    )
  )

# =======================
# EXPORT STATS
# =======================
write_csv(raw_emmeans,   file.path(out_dir, "emmeans_raw_absorbance.csv"))
write_csv(raw_contrasts, file.path(out_dir, "stats_raw_absorbance_68_vs_0_by_cell_line.csv"))

write_csv(norm_emmeans,   file.path(out_dir, "emmeans_normalized_absorbance.csv"))
write_csv(norm_contrasts, file.path(out_dir, "stats_normalized_absorbance_68_vs_0_by_cell_line.csv"))

write_csv(
  emm_combined_df,
  file.path(out_dir, "emmeans_combined_model.csv")
)

write_csv(
  contr_combined_df,
  file.path(out_dir, "stats_combined_model_68_vs_0_sidak.csv")
)

# =======================
# SUMMARY TABLES FOR PLOTTING
# =======================
plot_raw <- df_norm %>%
  group_by(Cell_line, Draxin) %>%
  summarise(
    mean = mean(Absorbance, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd   = sd(Absorbance, na.rm = TRUE),
    n    = n(),
    sem  = sd / sqrt(n),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

plot_norm <- df_norm %>%
  group_by(Cell_line, Draxin) %>%
  summarise(
    mean = mean(Absorbance_norm, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd   = sd(Absorbance_norm, na.rm = TRUE),
    n    = n(),
    sem  = sd / sqrt(n),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

write_csv(plot_raw,  file.path(out_dir, "plot_summary_raw.csv"))
write_csv(plot_norm, file.path(out_dir, "plot_summary_normalized.csv"))

# =======================
# PLOT RAW ABSORBANCE
# =======================
p_raw <- ggplot(df_norm, aes(x = Draxin, y = Absorbance)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.08, height = 0, size = 2, alpha = 0.8) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", size = 3) +
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = "errorbar", width = 0.15) +
  facet_wrap(~ Cell_line, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(
    title = "Raw absorbance by cell line",
    x = "Draxin (nM)",
    y = "Absorbance"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(out_dir, "plot_raw_absorbance_by_cell_line.pdf"),
  plot = p_raw,
  width = 8,
  height = 6
)

# =======================
# PLOT NORMALIZED ABSORBANCE
# =======================
p_norm <- ggplot(df_norm, aes(x = Draxin, y = Absorbance_norm)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.08, height = 0, size = 2, alpha = 0.8) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", size = 3) +
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = "errorbar", width = 0.15) +
  facet_wrap(~ Cell_line, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(
    title = "Normalized absorbance by cell line",
    x = "Draxin (nM)",
    y = "Normalized absorbance (relative to Draxin 0)"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(out_dir, "plot_normalized_absorbance_by_cell_line.pdf"),
  plot = p_norm,
  width = 8,
  height = 6
)

# =======================
# OPTIONAL BAR PLOTS
# =======================
p_raw_bar <- ggplot(plot_raw, aes(x = Draxin, y = mean)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean - sem, ymax = mean + sem), width = 0.15) +
  facet_wrap(~ Cell_line, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(
    title = "Raw absorbance summary",
    x = "Draxin (nM)",
    y = "Mean absorbance ± SEM"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(out_dir, "barplot_raw_absorbance_by_cell_line.pdf"),
  plot = p_raw_bar,
  width = 8,
  height = 6
)

p_norm_bar <- ggplot(plot_norm, aes(x = Draxin, y = mean)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean - sem, ymax = mean + sem), width = 0.15) +
  facet_wrap(~ Cell_line, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(
    title = "Normalized absorbance summary",
    x = "Draxin (nM)",
    y = "Mean normalized absorbance ± SEM"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(out_dir, "barplot_normalized_absorbance_by_cell_line.pdf"),
  plot = p_norm_bar,
  width = 8,
  height = 6
)

print("Done.")
```
